global.description: The ad features a modern design with abstract shapes and clear text elements promoting a financial service.
global.main_message: Promoting a fast signup for a financial service with a clear call to action.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: This element features two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one rectangular, in a muted color.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: This element contains a similar design to ID 1, with overlapping shapes that are slightly different in size and position.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: This element displays a larger abstract design with various geometric forms, creating a layered effect.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: This element features bold, prominent text that reads 'Track every euro Fast signup, instant card' in a clear, modern font.
elements.text_content: Track every euro Fast signup, instant card

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: This element is a button with the text '$4.99 Install now' in a contrasting color, designed to attract attention.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: This element displays the logo 'NovaPay' in a simple, recognizable font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: This element is a small tag labeled 'UGC' positioned at the top left corner, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, minimalist with bold text, key elements include a headline, call to action, and logo.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centrally positioned, the call to action is at the bottom, and the logo is at the top.
